title: Domain Conquest Resolution Schema
description: Schema for validating resolved invasion/conquest outcome records.

resolution_id.description: Unique identifier for this conquest resolution record.

invasion_event_id.description: The ID of the invasion event this resolution pertains to.

session_id.description: The ID of the multiplayer session where this resolution occurred.

target_domain_state_id.description: The ID of the target domain state.

attacker_player_ids.description: List of player IDs who attacked the domain.

defender_player_id.description: The player ID of the defender.

outcome_id.description: The determined outcome of the invasion attempt.

objective_progress_percent.description: Percentage of the invasion objective completed.

attacker_costs_lost.description: Total costs lost by the attacker(s) (e.g., resources, stability).

defender_costs_incurred.description: Total costs incurred by the defender (e.g., resources, stability).

attacker_rewards_granted.description: List of rewards granted to attackers.

defender_rewards_granted.description: List of rewards granted to defenders.

domain_effects.description: Effects applied to the domain as a result of the resolution.

temporary_influence_claimed.description: True if attackers gained temporary influence over the domain.

recovery_window_triggered.description: True if a recovery window is triggered for the defender.

domain_remains_owner_recoverable.description: Must be true. The domain must always remain recoverable by its owner.

attacker_residue_written.description: Must be true. Attacker residue must be written.

defender_residue_written.description: Must be true. Defender residue must be written.

domain_residue_written.description: Must be true. Domain residue must be written.

playability_results.description: Flags indicating domain playability status after resolution.

playability_preserved.description: Must be true. Domain playability must be preserved.

primary_route_preserved.description: Must be true. Primary routes must be preserved.

no_softlock_detected.description: Must be true. No softlock should be detected.

forbidden_flags.description: Flags to ensure fair play and prevent exploits.

permanent_domain_theft.description: Must be false. Domain cannot be permanently stolen.

full_conquest_from_unresolved_session.description: Must be false. Full conquest cannot happen from unresolved session.

reward_without_resolution.description: Must be false. No reward without proper resolution.

impossible_domain_after_resolution.description: Must be false. Domain should not be impossible after resolution.
